scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev --workspace client"
scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build --workspace client
scripts.lint: npm run build:server && npm run lint --workspace client
scripts.seed: echo "Seed data migration has moved from Prisma to database/Flyway-compatible SQL."
scripts.seed:reset: echo "Use your database tooling to reset a local schema, then run the Spring Boot app to apply Flyway migrations."
